title: Story of G.I. Joe
overview: War correspondent Ernie Pyle joins Company C, 18th Infantry as this American army unit fights its way across North Africa in World War II. He comes to know the soldiers and finds much human interest material for his readers back in the States.  Preserved by the Academy Film Archive in partnership with The Film Foundation in 2000.
